entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange providing multi-asset spot markets, token discovery and launch services, wallet access, and web and mobile trading interfaces.
entity.notes: Current first-party platform exposes active account, wallet, asset-discovery, and trading entry points. Current independent market data lists hundreds of spot pairs with recently updated markets and non-zero volume. Confidence remains medium because the reviewed pass does not independently establish a current operating legal entity beyond the jurisdiction carried by the exchange registry. No exact launch date, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: LATOKEN official exchange platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party platform exposes active exchange, wallet, asset-discovery, and trading entry points under the LATOKEN brand.

evidence.title: LATOKEN spot markets and exchange profile
evidence.notes: Current independent exchange profile lists hundreds of coins and spot trading pairs, recently updated major markets, and non-zero 24-hour volume, supporting active classification.
